title: Passport processing
description: % of straightforward passport applications within the service standard
measure: % of straightforward passport applications within the service standard

provenance.derivation: Direct from source; latest value validated against validRange

qualityDimensions.accuracy: Not asserted by Govviz; upstream producer methodology remains authoritative.
qualityDimensions.completeness: 10 observations emitted in the tidy data file.
qualityDimensions.uniqueness: One observation per period/ref_area key in the emitted tidy table.
qualityDimensions.consistency: Compiled by the same source-specific parser and emitted through one CSVW schema.
qualityDimensions.timeliness: Latest observed period 2026-03 is older than the expected quarterly cadence projection 2026-06-01; latest source fetch recorded 2026-07-02.
qualityDimensions.validity: Latest source values passed the published validRange 50 to 100.

freshnessReason: Latest observed period 2026-03 is older than the expected quarterly cadence projection 2026-06-01; latest source fetch recorded 2026-07-02.
limitations: Govviz is a downstream compiler, not the primary publisher.
The primary producer may not publish the same tidy structure, stable id, CSVW metadata, or validation range upstream.
Freshness metadata is inferred from observed periods and fetch timestamps; it is not an official release calendar.
The contact and accountability route remains the primary producer's published route, not a Govviz official statistics contact.
No upstream policy-as-code conformance assertion has been made by the primary producer.
